title: Amtech - Carpenter’s Square Tool, Speed Square 12 Inch, Use as a Saw Guide, Framing Square, Ruler, and More for Woodworking and Home DIY, Clear and Accurate Scale, Durable Aluminium Alloy (300mm)
features: PRECISION: Clear and accurate scale for precise measurements in woodworking tasks.
DURABLE: Crafted from premium aluminium alloy for durability and corrosion resistance.
VERSATILE: Can be used as a protractor, miter, line scriber, saw guide, framing square, and ruler.
WIDE APPLICATION: Ideal for woodworking projects in manufacturing and decoration industries.
USER-FRIENDLY: Features a user-friendly design with exquisite workmanship for long service life.
description: Product Description The clear and accurate scale ensures precise measurements and easy angle marking in various woodworking tasks. Ideal for working with large timbers, the roofing square can be used as a protractor, mitre, line scriber, saw guide, framing square, and ruler. Its user-friendly design makes it perfect for both professionals and DIYers. Made from high-quality aluminium alloy, the square is resistant to corrosion and breakage for long lasting use that you can rely on.
